query: WITH message_status AS (SELECT COALESCE(direction,'unknown') AS direction, COALESCE(delivery_status,'null') AS delivery_status, count(*) AS ct, count(*) FILTER (WHERE ghl_message_id IS NULL) AS missing_ghl_message_id, count(*) FILTER (WHERE ghl_conversation_id IS NULL) AS missing_ghl_conversation_id, max(timestamp) AS latest_at FROM message_log GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY ct DESC), inbound_status AS (SELECT COALESCE(source,'unknown') AS source, COALESCE(processed,false) AS processed, count(*) AS ct, min(captured_at) AS oldest_at, max(captured_at) AS newest_at, count(*) FILTER (WHERE ghl_message_id IS NULL) AS missing_ghl_message_id, count(*) FILTER (WHERE contact_id IS NULL OR location_id IS NULL) AS missing_identity FROM inbound_capture GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY ct DESC), inbound_unprocessed_sample AS (SELECT id, captured_at, source, contact_id, location_id, ghl_message_id, replay_count, notes, left(payload::text, 600) AS payload_excerpt FROM inbound_capture WHERE processed IS NOT TRUE ORDER BY captured_at ASC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 25), inbound_duplicate_ids AS (SELECT ghl_message_id, count(*) AS ct, min(captured_at) AS first_seen, max(captured_at) AS last_seen FROM inbound_capture WHERE ghl_message_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ghl_message_id HAVING count(*) > 1 ORDER BY ct DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 25), message_duplicate_ids AS (SELECT ghl_message_id, count(*) AS ct, min(timestamp) AS first_seen, max(timestamp) AS last_seen FROM message_log WHERE ghl_message_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ghl_message_id HAVING count(*) > 1 ORDER BY ct DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 25), orphan_messages AS (SELECT count(*) AS ct FROM message_log ml LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.contact_id = ml.contact_id AND l.location_id = ml.location_id WHERE l.id IS NULL), orphan_inbound AS (SELECT count(*) AS ct FROM inbound_capture ic LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.contact_id = ic.contact_id AND l.location_id = ic.location_id WHERE ic.contact_id IS NOT NULL AND ic.location_id IS NOT NULL AND l.id IS NULL), recent_message_samples AS (SELECT id, contact_id, location_id, direction, channel, delivery_status, ai_processed, ai_intent, intent_detected, ghl_message_id IS NOT NULL AS has_ghl_message_id, ghl_conversation_id IS NOT NULL AS has_ghl_conversation_id, timestamp, left(message_body, 300) AS message_excerpt FROM message_log ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 30), error_summary AS (SELECT COALESCE(classification,'unclassified') AS classification, COALESCE(http_status::text,'null') AS http_status, COALESCE(ghl_error_code,'null') AS ghl_error_code, count(*) AS ct, max(attempt_at) AS latest_at FROM message_send_errors GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY ct DESC, latest_at DESC), recent_send_errors AS (SELECT id, message_log_id, contact_id, location_id, attempt_at, http_status, ghl_error_code, ghl_error_name, classification, retry_count, left(raw_message, 300) AS raw_message_excerpt, left(raw_response::text, 600) AS raw_response_excerpt FROM message_send_errors ORDER BY attempt_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 25), system_error_summary AS (SELECT COALESCE(workflow_name,'unknown') AS workflow_name, COALESCE(node_name,'unknown') AS node_name, COALESCE(error_level,'unknown') AS error_level, count(*) AS ct, max(created_at) AS latest_at FROM system_errors GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY ct DESC, latest_at DESC LIMIT 50), recent_system_errors AS (SELECT id, created_at, source, workflow_id, workflow_name, execution_id, node_name, error_level, contact_id, location_id, left(error_message, 400) AS error_message_excerpt, resolved_at IS NOT NULL AS resolved FROM system_errors ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 30), context_health AS (SELECT count(*) AS total_contexts, count(*) FILTER (WHERE appointment_offered IS TRUE) AS appointment_offered, count(*) FILTER (WHERE appointment_booked IS TRUE) AS appointment_booked, count(*) FILTER (WHERE appointment_pending_slot IS NOT NULL) AS appointment_pending_slot, count(*) FILTER (WHERE next_action IS NOT NULL AND length(next_action) > 0) AS has_next_action, count(*) FILTER (WHERE last_intent IS NOT NULL AND length(last_intent) > 0) AS has_last_intent, count(*) FILTER (WHERE conversation_summary IS NOT NULL AND length(conversation_summary) > 0) AS has_conversation_summary FROM conversation_context), recent_context_samples AS (SELECT id, contact_id, location_id, last_intent, appointment_offered, appointment_booked, appointment_pending_slot, next_action, lead_temperature, lead_intent, lead_timeline, updated_at, left(conversation_summary, 400) AS conversation_summary_excerpt FROM conversation_context ORDER BY updated_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 30) SELECT jsonb_build_object('audit_generated_at', now(), 'counts', jsonb_build_object('message_log', (SELECT count(*) FROM message_log), 'inbound_capture', (SELECT count(*) FROM inbound_capture), 'message_send_errors', (SELECT count(*) FROM message_send_errors), 'system_errors', (SELECT count(*) FROM system_errors), 'conversation_context', (SELECT count(*) FROM conversation_context), 'leads', (SELECT count(*) FROM leads), 'appointments', (SELECT count(*) FROM appointments)), 'message_status', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(message_status)) FROM message_status), '[]'::jsonb), 'inbound_status', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(inbound_status)) FROM inbound_status), '[]'::jsonb), 'inbound_unprocessed_sample', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(inbound_unprocessed_sample)) FROM inbound_unprocessed_sample), '[]'::jsonb), 'inbound_duplicate_ids', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(inbound_duplicate_ids)) FROM inbound_duplicate_ids), '[]'::jsonb), 'message_duplicate_ids', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(message_duplicate_ids)) FROM message_duplicate_ids), '[]'::jsonb), 'orphan_summary', jsonb_build_object('message_log_without_lead', (SELECT ct FROM orphan_messages), 'inbound_capture_without_lead', (SELECT ct FROM orphan_inbound)), 'recent_message_samples', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(recent_message_samples)) FROM recent_message_samples), '[]'::jsonb), 'error_summary', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(error_summary)) FROM error_summary), '[]'::jsonb), 'recent_send_errors', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(recent_send_errors)) FROM recent_send_errors), '[]'::jsonb), 'system_error_summary', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(system_error_summary)) FROM system_error_summary), '[]'::jsonb), 'recent_system_errors', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(recent_system_errors)) FROM recent_system_errors), '[]'::jsonb), 'context_health', (SELECT to_jsonb(context_health) FROM context_health), 'recent_context_samples', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(recent_context_samples)) FROM recent_context_samples), '[]'::jsonb)) AS communication_log_audit;
